summary: Website project with a background image section (white text) and remaining sections with black text. Features a PFH logo and statistics like Years Experience, Jobs Completed, and Satisfaction.
architectural_notes: Text color rule: white text only on sections with background image; all other text black

existing_features.title: In all non-Hero sections — About, Services, Contact, Footer, and Navigation — change all text that was previously overridden to white (text-white) back to black (text-gray-900 or equivalent dark/ink color), restoring the default dark text appearance.

new_feature_requests.summary: In the Hero section (which has the background image), keep all text — including the headline, tagline, stat labels (Years Experience, Jobs Completed, Satisfaction), and the subheading — styled as white (text-white).
